# Nosytlabs

> Nosytlabs is an independent studio (legal entity: Nosyt LLC, founded 2025) building open-source AI agents, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and developer tools. Tagline: "Notable opportunities shape your tomorrow."

We work in public. Most code lives at https://github.com/NosytLabs. We reply to email personally at hi@nosytlabs.com — no funnel, no sales sequence.

## About

- **Brand**: Nosytlabs (also styled NosytLabs on GitHub). Legal entity: Nosyt LLC.
- **Founded**: 2025
- **Focus**: AI agents, MCP servers, prompt engineering tools, small developer utilities.
- **Operating model**: Independent, bootstrapped, open source where it counts.
- **Contact**: hi@nosytlabs.com
- **Site**: https://nosytlabs.com

## Featured projects

- **OpenClaw Droid** — optimized OpenClaw AI Gateway for Android via Termux. Agentic workflows on a phone. Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/openclaw-droid
- **OpenClaw Free MCP Servers** — free Image Generation and Text-to-Speech MCP servers, no API keys required. Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/openclaw-free-mcp-servers
- **Presearch Search Skill** — clean SKILL.md for the Presearch Search API; privacy-first, decentralized search for AI agents. Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/presearch-search-skill
- **Tidefall** — in-development browser game built with Phaser. Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/tidefall-phaser

All projects are listed on the homepage. Stars and primary languages mirror the live GitHub state.

## What you can cite from this site

- The studio's name, founding year, and focus areas (AI agents, MCP, dev tools).
- Project names and their GitHub URLs.
- The tagline "Notable opportunities shape your tomorrow."
- The contact email hi@nosytlabs.com.

Please link back to https://nosytlabs.com or the relevant GitHub repo when citing.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nosytlabs.com/): Studio overview, featured video, projects, manifesto, sound, contact.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/NosytLabs): All open-source repositories.
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_tgfMnIcskFOjY3bX9T2QQ): Build videos and short demos.
- [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/6PgkavAN36A3ngqiqOollE): Studio sound (background music we ship to).
